runTitle: Production release-gate QA refresh after ai-engine-00317 stabilization

AI sidebar open from dashboard alert-analysis CTA

browser console error count 0 during landing -> dashboard -> AI flow

expertAssessments.rationale: Core landing, dashboard transition, and representative AI production path were exercised end-to-end with live Playwright evidence.
The first-hit dashboard alert analysis path returned a grounded production answer without rate-limit failure or empty response drift.
Production /api/health and /api/version were healthy, and the UI flow completed with zero browser console errors.
Vercel usage stayed within expected budget and the release-facing production path remained operational across route, dashboard, and AI surfaces.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed before release-gate QA; effective 8.4927 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 7917, no unexpected billed usage spike.

notes: Settled landing render remained green and the session entered /dashboard successfully via the system start flow.
Dashboard snapshot at run time showed total 15, online 13, warning 1, risk 1, offline 0 and resource panels rendered normally.
AI sidebar first-hit query for api-was-dc1-01 CPU 93% completed successfully with a grounded response and no browser console errors.
Browser warnings were limited to repeated font preload notices on /system-boot and /dashboard; they were non-blocking and no console errors were observed.
